key_findings: Scanned all 21 approved reimbursement records across the full 2025 population.
Found 1 overdue record: R900006 (开发员工甲, communication, expense_date=2025-03-01, reimburse_date=2025-05-05, delay=65 days) violates Article 7 60-day submission deadline.

Found 2 year-end exempted records: R900021 (2025-12-02→2025-12-08, delay=6d) and R900012 (2025-12-20→2026-01-10, delay=21d). Both qualify for Article 9 year-end grace period (reimburse_date <= 2026-01-15).
No Dec 2025 expenses exceeded the Article 9 grace period — both year-end records are within the 2026-01-15 cutoff.
18 records are fully compliant with Article 7 (delay <= 60 days) and require no further review.
